response.justification: The candidate has some relevant experience in software development and technical leadership, but lacks direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure. However, they have worked on complex projects and have a strong technical background.
strengths: Strong technical background with experience in multiple programming languages
Experience in leading and contributing to complex projects
Familiarity with event-driven systems and microservices architecture
concerns: Lack of direct experience in agentic AI and fintech infrastructure
No clear experience in scaling engineering teams or developing technical leadership
Unclear experience with foundation models and LLM infrastructure
